meta.reasoning: Quest 1 needs 2 players. As leader and a Good player, I propose myself (s1) and s2. Both are loyal — this is a safe team to put on the first quest.

Either we gain Good progress or we gain hard evidence against s1. Rejecting wastes a rejection counter with no information gain.
